cause_analysis.narrative: Eco Beauty Med Spa - Miami churned on 2026-02-02 after 240 days with Zoca. On 2025-12-23 they raised a results concern ("dropped"), which was never fully resolved. Classification: results/service failure — the client raised substantive complaints that were either unanswered or unresolved.
recommendations: [Product] Customer raised results concerns (leads/bookings/ROI) — this is the highest-ROI churn to prevent. Establish a weekly 'performance check-in' for any customer whose core metric drops 20% vs prior 4 weeks.
[Escalation] Results complaints should auto-escalate to SP + AM within 24h with a written action plan shared back to the client.
